title: Highway condition report
description: The ONLY spatial payload a contributor sends. It has no free-form coordinate field: an off-highway point is unrepresentable. The server re-derives (x,z) from (road,seg,along) using its own authoritative geometry and rejects any unknown field.

server.description: server id; must be a server the ingest knows

map.description: geometry version hash the client snapped against

road.description: index into the authoritative road table for that map version

seg.description: segment index within that road's polyline

along.description: quantized distance along that segment (bucket index)

cond.description: observed condition; all observable while standing on the road

laneMin.description: required iff cond==OBSTRUCTION_PARTIAL: min blocked lane offset (blocks from centerline, within the road's own width)

laneMax.description: required iff cond==OBSTRUCTION_PARTIAL: max blocked lane offset; laneMin <= laneMax

sev.description: optional observation strength; for OBSTRUCTION_* this is the stall-duration tier (1=3-6s, 2=6-15s, 3=15s+)

ts.description: optional coarse unix time, rounded to 30s by the client
